full_text:
Li Qian 李乾
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Qian (李乾). Had heroic qualities, served Cao Cao early on but was killed in Lü Bu’s revolt. Li Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Qian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
